description: behavioral-spec.md PROP-FEED-S6-001 cell 3 (line 1338) and cell 4 (line 1339) omit `delete-button.disabled === false` clause, while verification-architecture.md:801 PROP-FEED-S6-001 explicitly asserts `delete-button.disabled === false (他行のため delete 可能)` for cell 3 and cell 4. Asymmetry between the two artifacts on the disabled-state assertion. Not blocking because verification-architecture is canonical and the property is inferred from REQ-FEED-010 / `isDeleteButtonDisabled` (Sprint 1 既存 pure helper) which returns false when rowNoteId !== editingNoteId. Phase 2a implementer can derive the assertion from the canonical PROP definition.

evidence.snippet:
cell 3: `... AND querySelector('[data-testid="delete-button"]') !== null` (no disabled clause)
cell 4: same shape (no disabled clause)

crossReference.verificationArchitecture: .vcsdd/features/ui-feed-list-actions/specs/verification-architecture.md:801 — PROP-FEED-S6-001 cell 3 / cell 4 assert `delete-button.disabled === false (他行のため delete 可能)`
